faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about SallyCards.
faq.a1: Yes, SallyCards is 100% free. All games, modes and features are accessible without any payment.
faq.a2: Yes! You can play against AI bots in offline mode. Multiplayer mode requires an internet connection.
faq.a3: SallyCards offers 10 card games: Ronda, Kdoub, Belote, Poker, Tarot, Trex, Rami, Trix, Chkobba and Hand.
faq.q4: On which platforms is SallyCards available?
faq.a4: SallyCards is available on iOS and Android. A web version is also under development.
faq.a5: Create a private table and share the code with your friends, or join a public table to play with players from around the world.
faq.a6: The 8 AI bots have different difficulty levels, from beginner to expert. You can choose the level that suits you.
